# PERF-187 negative: a template is parsed inside a sync.Once at startup, never in handler
lang: go
file: PERF-187-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var (
	tmpl     *template.Template
	tmplOnce sync.Once
)

func loadTmpl() *template.Template {
	tmplOnce.Do(func() {
		tmpl = template.ParseFiles("./hi.tmpl")
	})
	return tmpl
}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	_ = loadTmpl().Execute(w, name)
}
